name: mrinal-skills
description: Mrinal Dhillon's portable personal Claude Code skills, grouped into installable plugins.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Cross-repo personal Claude Code layer: skills (cost-aware delegation, orchestrator-worker fan-out, trunk-based git workflow, tiered deep research), review/search/doc agents, the distinguished-engineer output style, and universal git/secret guard hooks.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Project-enabled scaffolding layer: milestone/dev/skill-maintenance workflows, the ADR + milestone commands and the /scaffold:milestone-run runner, context-checkpoint & config-guard hooks, a determinism auditor, and references/ for by-hand project setup. Enable per-repo in .claude/settings.json; requires the core plugin and assumes the docs/ + .context/ layout.
